overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through a dark futuristic city alley at night. The scene features neon-lit skyscrapers, holographic advertisements, and wet pavement reflecting cyan and orange neon lights. The character progresses from a narrow enclosed passage into a wider urban street with commercial storefronts.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow service alley between high-rise buildings

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the narrow alley toward the distant neon-lit street

entered.detail: tall dark concrete barrier running along the left side of the narrow passage
dark industrial building wall with minimal lighting on the right side
elevated walkway spanning across the alleyway ahead
large illuminated advertisement displaying a character, mounted on distant skyscraper
reflective wet ground surface showing neon light reflections

segments.scene_description: The segment shows a narrow enclosed alleyway at night with high concrete walls on both sides. The camera follows the character walking forward toward a distant overhead bridge and holographic billboard. The wet pavement reflects the cyan neon lights from above, and a few pedestrians are visible walking ahead in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: neon-lit urban street with commercial storefronts

events.description: exits narrow alley into wider urban street with visible neon storefronts and signage

agents.ego_description: continuing forward as the space opens up, passing pedestrians on the left side

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in red jacket walking in same direction, passed closely by ego on the left

entered.detail: commercial entrance with bright orange and cyan neon lighting on the right building facade
red illuminated traffic signals visible at the end of the street

segments.scene_description: The space opens up into a wider urban street as the character exits the narrow alley. The right side reveals a bright neon storefront entrance, while the left concrete wall recedes into the background. The character passes a pedestrian in a red jacket on the left while approaching the overhead pedestrian bridge. The holographic billboard shifts to the left side of the frame as the camera advances toward the distant traffic lights.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a claustrophobic urban alleyway that gradually opens into a vibrant, wide city street. It begins by trailing a character through a narrow passage enclosed by high concrete walls, where wet pavement reflects cyan neon lights under a distant overhead bridge and holographic billboard. As the character advances, the space expands and the concrete walls recede, revealing a bright neon storefront entrance on the right. The camera then passes a pedestrian in a red jacket while the holographic billboard shifts to the left of the frame. Finally, the scene opens fully into the urban thoroughfare as the character moves toward distant traffic lights.
